synopsis:
**The Trial of Lando Calrissian!**

After the events of Dark Droids, Lando is at a crossroads. Saving his friend Lobot has cost him more than he expected as now Admiral Ackbar and Mon Mothma are putting Lando on trial. With the Rebellion locked in battle with the Empire, how will this trial's end impact the Rebellion's future?
title: Star Wars (2020) #44
